Loading @composition/tests/assets/TrickyRelocationOfPrimFromVariant_root/usda/root.usd@

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Layer Stack:
     root.usd

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Char
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig{TailRigVersion=Standard}

Variant Selections:
    {TailRigVersion = Standard}

Child names:
     ['TailRig', 'Anim']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char/TailRig>

Prim Stack:
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig{TailRigVersion=Standard}TailRig
    TailRig.usd          /TailRig

Prohibited child names:
     ['Tail']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char/Anim>

Prim Stack:
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig/Anim

Child names:
     ['Tail']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char/Anim/Tail>

Prim Stack:
    TailRig.usd          /TailRig/Tail

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char2>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Char2
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig2
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig2{TailRigVersion=None}

Variant Selections:
    {TailRigVersion = None}

Child names:
     ['Anim']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Char2/Anim>

Prim Stack:
    CharRig.usd          /CharRig2/Anim

Child names:
     ['Tail']

Results for composing </Char2/Anim/Tail>
